title: Eileen Lohmann | Partner | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Partner // Washington, D.C.
“Immigration law and policy is complex and constantly changing in ways that directly impact people’s lives. At BAL, we are uniquely positioned to help clients navigate both the details and the broader policy landscape. There will always be uncertainty, and I strive to partner with our clients to adapt to change, look around the corner whenever possible and determine how to best support employees and their families through a challenging process.”
Eileen is a Partner and member of BAL’s Government Strategies team in the Washington, D.C., office. She is a legislative and government policy expert, providing strategic counsel to clients on corporate immigration program compliance, management and policy engagement. Eileen advises clients on a wide range of corporate immigration matters, including Form I-9 and E-Verify compliance, H-1B program obligations and immigration compliance audits. She is a frequent speaker on immigration issues, ranging from small leadership briefings to large industry and HR events. Eileen is an active member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association and serves on the national Verification and Documentation Committee. Her career experience includes appellate work at the U.S. Department of Justice Office of Immigration Litigation and policy engagement with the National Immigrant Women’s Advocacy Project.
American University Washington College of Law, J.D., cum laude Georgetown University, B.A., English and French, cum laude
State Bar of Virginia
